description: Letter sent from Jerusalem concerning the communal property of the Palestinian community in Egypt. The letter is written in the handwriting of Eli ha-Kohen. (Information from Goitein's index cards). Remnants of address in Arabic at the back. Reads as "al-Fusṭāṭ".
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
